phrases.intent_en: Ask which entrance to use for your seats
phrases.text_local: C'est quelle entrée pour ma place ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh kel an-TRAY poor mah plass
phrases.cultural_note: The Stade de France has multiple lettered entrances. Check your ticket before arriving.

responses.english: It is entrance E. It is marked on your ticket.
responses.phonetic: seh lan-TRAY uh. seh ahn-dee-KAY soor votr bee-YAY
responses.french: C'est l'entrée E. C'est indiqué sur votre billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro station for the stadium
phrases.text_local: C'est quelle station de métro pour le Stade de France ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh kel stah-SYOHN duh may-TROH poor luh STAHD duh FRAHNSS
phrases.cultural_note: Take RER B or RER D to 'La Plaine — Stade de France' or metro line 13 to 'Saint-Denis — Porte de Paris'. Follow the crowd on event days — you can't miss it.

responses.english: Saint-Denis-Porte de Paris station, on line 13.
responses.phonetic: lah stah-SYOHN san duh-NEE port duh pah-REE, soor lah leen-yuh trehz
responses.french: La station Saint-Denis-Porte de Paris, sur la ligne treize.

phrases.text_local: C'est quel match de rugby aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh kel MATCH duh roog-BEE oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Stade de France hosts Six Nations rugby, where France plays England, Ireland, and others. The rugby atmosphere is more festive and family-friendly than football.

responses.english: The schedule is posted at the entrance and on the website.
responses.phonetic: luh proh-GRAM eh tah-fee-SHAY ah lan-TRAY ay soor luh seet ahn-tehr-NET
responses.french: Le programme est affiché à l'entrée et sur le site internet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about concert events at the stadium
phrases.text_local: Il y a des concerts prévus bientôt ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah day kohn-SEHR pray-VOO byehn-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The Stade de France hosts major concerts (Beyoncé, Coldplay, etc.) with 80,000 capacity. Check the official website for upcoming events.

responses.english: Concerts are announced on the website. Check the dates.
responses.phonetic: lay kohn-SEHR sohn tah-nohn-SAY soor luh seet. vay-ree-fee-AY lay daht
responses.french: Les concerts sont annoncés sur le site. Vérifiez les dates.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the guided stadium tour
phrases.text_local: On peut faire une visite guidée du stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: ohn puh FEHR oon vee-ZEET ghee-DAY doo STAHD
phrases.cultural_note: Tours run on non-event days and take about 90 minutes. You'll see the locker rooms, royal box, and walk through the player tunnel onto the pitch.

responses.english: Guided tours are available online. Allow one hour.
responses.phonetic: lay vee-ZEET gee-DAY sohn dees-poh-NEE-bluh ahn LEEN-yuh. kohn-TAY oon uhr
responses.french: Les visites guidées sont disponibles en ligne. Comptez une heure.
